source_query: Philadelphia PA carpentry public business listing; official website; nonprofit profile; public social profile
source_evidence: Official site identifies Philadelphia Furniture Workshop as a woodworking and furniture-making school offering classes, not a carpentry contractor. Official contact page lists 5212 Pulaski Ave, Philadelphia PA 19144, phone 215-849-5174, and philadelphiafurnitureworkshop@gmail.com. Official Alan Turner page says Alan Turner founded PFW and donated the school to a nonprofit in 2014. Cause IQ lists it as a 501(c)(3) educational services organization, EIN 47-2180450, and lists Craig Stevens as Executive Director. Public Facebook page also labels it as a school.
visible_gap: Good public identity, but target mismatch: educational nonprofit/school rather than a service-based carpentry company for contractor outreach.
offer_angle: Reject from contractor lead factory; possible future nonprofit/education audit list only if a separate campaign is created.
lead_type: woodworking and furniture-making school / 501(c)(3) educational nonprofit in Philadelphia, PA
public_research_note: Rejected because public evidence verifies a real organization but not a service-based carpentry contractor. Official website and contact page identify a woodworking/furniture-making school; nonprofit profiles identify 501(c)(3) educational-services status and Craig Stevens as Executive Director; Alan Turner is founder but retired. Keep as rejected source-quality intelligence, not active contractor outreach.
recommended_action: reject_do_not_contact_for_service_contractor_campaign; consider only if a future nonprofit/education offer lane is intentionally opened
